message:
feat(pthread/arena): promote 5 pthread symbols to native and add arena quarantine tests

Promote pthread_create, pthread_detach, pthread_equal, pthread_join, and
pthread_self from GlibcCallThrough to Implemented in the support matrix,
reflecting the clone-backed native thread management landed in effcb00.
Update all conformance artifacts (callthrough census, reality report,
replacement levels, replacement profile, workload API wave plan) to
reflect the reduced callthrough surface: 30 -> 25 symbols, 55% -> 57%
implemented, and collapse decommission waves from 5 to 3 by removing the
now-completed pthread-foundation and pthread-lifecycle waves.

Add two new unit tests to the membrane arena allocator:
- free_promotes_slot_to_quarantined_with_new_generation: verifies free
  transitions slots to Quarantined state with bumped generation
- quarantine_drain_evicts_oldest_when_entry_count_exceeded: validates
  entry-count-based drain evicts exactly the oldest entry

Apply rustfmt to TLS test RCU read chains (whitespace only).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+      "strict_semantics": "Native clone-backed thread creation via core ThreadHandle; null thread_out/start rejected with EINVAL and non-null attr rejected deterministically",
